Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches MPL: The First 2X Long ETF for MP Materials, Corp.

holdings.infoBox: MPL is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 57.90%, MP MATERIALS CORP SWAP CANTOR at 39.91%, MP MATERIALS CORP SWAP JNST-L at 38.24%, MP MATERIALS SWAP CS - L at 36.85%, and MP MATERIALS SWAP MAREX at 36.35%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long MP ETF (MPL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of MP Materials Corp. (ticker: MP), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements MPL was launched on Oct 20, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
